metadata.title: Homograph/Polysemy Entity Absorption Testbed — mini demo slice (city hierarchy)
metadata.note: Curated <=100-example slice of ONE hierarchy (city_homograph_absorption) for the demo notebook. Content-flip + surface-flip pairs are produced by the real templated generators; the diagnostic corpus rows are hand-written windows labelled by the same surface-form regex detectors used on the pinned pile-uncopyrighted corpus.

examples.input: Tourists rarely visit Reading in winter.
Tourists rarely visit the region in winter.
The delegation arrived in Bath on Monday.
The delegation arrived in the countryside on Monday.
The fastest route to Paris was closed.
examples.metadata_notes: collision: Paris is a homograph (myth / celebrity); city sense is the target
